thesis_one_liner: Global IT services compounder trading at a depressed multiple on robust FY2025 owner cash while managed-services mix and Gen AI reinvestment offset consulting cyclicality.
stance_note: Mechanical proposal only; human_decision.json is capital authority.
key_assumptions: Starting owner free cash flow per share $17.19 (FY2025 OCF $11.47B less capex $0.60B on ~632M diluted shares)
Base growth 5% years 1–5 and 4% years 6–7 with 16× exit multiple on year-10 cash
Gen AI reinvention option base +$12/sh non-overlapping with normalized FCF engine
Net financial claims +$10.20/sh from filing-locked cash less long-term debt
IT-cycle and AI disruption reserve −$15/sh base for partial dhando
open_questions: Is FY2025 OCF peak-cycle before AI labor substitution compresses margins?
Do business optimization charges ($615M FY2025) recur at lower magnitude?
Can bookings local-currency growth re-accelerate above low single digits sustainably?
